title: Om Hom
description: 🧪 Adds a new cute mob - Om Hom 🧪
body:
- **Om Hom** is an unusual animal and can only be obtained from a **Wandering Trader**.

- His favorite food is **candy**, which unfortunately cannot be created. However, it can be purchased from a **farmer at level 2**.

- If you click on the specific item, it will become (picture below).
 
![Om hom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48dd4bfee2cb0dbd7a1e258a2c6f72b14faa333f.png)
